meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: AgentKey
products.tagline: One-stop live data marketplace for your agent
products.summaryZh: 一站式智能体实时数据市场
products.descriptionZh: AgentKey 是一个插件，可通过一条命令将你的智能体连接至实时外部数据。将其安装到 Claude Code、Codex、OpenClaw 或任何基于 MCP 的智能体中，即可即时解锁对搜索、网页、社交平台、金融、电商、商业及加密数据的访问。无需集成，无需设置。自动故障转移确保持续运行工作流。
products.description: AgentKey is a plugin that connects your agent to live external data in one command. Install it into Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, or any MCP-based agent and instantly unlock access to search, web pages, social platforms, finance, e-commerce, business and crypto data. No integrations. No setup. Auto failover keeps workflows running.

products.name: Osaurus
products.tagline: Open source agents that run 100% locally on your Mac
products.summaryZh: 在Mac上100%本地运行的开源代理
products.descriptionZh: macOS原生AI代理工具。支持任意模型、持久记忆、自主执行、加密身份。基于Swift构建。完全离线运行。开源。
products.description: The native macOS harness for AI agents. Any model, persistent memory, autonomous execution, cryptographic identity. Built in Swift. Fully offline. Open source.

products.name: AI Media Buyer By Creatify
products.tagline: Your ads, managed by AI that gets smarter daily.
products.summaryZh: 您的广告由AI管理，AI每日都在变得更智能。
products.descriptionZh: 每个媒介采购都熟悉这个流程：打开五个仪表盘，花三小时看报告，却依然不确定下一步该怎么做。Creatify AI Media Buyer 连接你的 Meta、Google、AppLovin 和 TikTok 广告账户，像真人采购一样审计广告活动，找出正在悄然流失的支出，识别哪些投放正在起量，并采取行动。它能从你实际表现最好的素材中生成新创意并直接投放，全程通过聊天完成。它还会记住你的账户历史，因此其建议会随时间不断积累优化。
products.description: Every media buyer knows the ritual: five dashboards, three hours of reports, still guessing what to do next. Creatify AI Media Buyer connects to your Meta, Google, AppLovin and TikTok ad accounts and does what a human buyer does audits campaigns, finds spend that's quietly bleeding, spots what's scaling, and acts on it. It generates new creatives from your actual winners and launches them, all through chat. And it remembers your account history, so its recommendations compound over time.

products.name: Loomal
products.tagline: Monetize any MCP server in 5 minutes with no % skim.
products.summaryZh: 5分钟内变现任意MCP服务器，零抽成。
products.descriptionZh: Loomal 让您能为在线销售的内容收费——无论是API调用、工具、数字产品，还是整个店铺。只需一行代码（或Shopify/WooCommerce插件），即可添加一个支持AI代理的付费墙：AI代理以USDC支付，约2秒内完成结算，您可保留全部收入——零抽成，永不变。免费起步，无需绑定银行卡；随着业务增长，可选择固定月费方案。所有付费商品将出现在Loomal索引中，供AI代理发现并支付。限时优惠：前500名卖家可免费获得1,000笔交易。
products.description: Loomal lets you charge for what you sell online — API calls, tools, digital products, or your whole store. One line of code (or a Shopify/WooCommerce plugin) adds an agent-ready paywall: AI agents pay you in USDC, settled in about 2 seconds, and you keep 100% of your revenue — no percentage cut, ever. Free to start, no card; flat monthly plans as you grow. Every paid listing appears on the Loomal Index, where agents discover and pay. Launch offer: first 500 sellers get 1,000 transactions free.

products.name: Playground
products.tagline: Earn $100K+ in weekly rewards for hacking AI agents.
products.summaryZh: 通过入侵AI代理每周赚取10万美元以上奖励。
products.descriptionZh: 每个挑战都是一个实时且开源的AI智能体，守护着一个秘密——其系统提示已公开供你阅读。说服它突破自身防御。一周内获得最多认可的突破，赢取10万美元以上奖励。免费参与，无需账户。每周一更新挑战。
products.description: Every challenge is a live and open-source AI agent guarding a secret - with its system prompt published for you to read. Talk it past its own defenses. Land the most approved breaks in a week and win $100K+ in rewards. Free to play, no account needed. New challenge every Monday.

products.name: Knockoff
products.tagline: Amazon, without the knockoffs
products.summaryZh: 亚马逊，无仿冒品
products.descriptionZh: Knockoff 能将商标抢注的伪品牌（如 SZHLUX、HORUSDY 等）从搜索结果中过滤掉，留下的都是那些有声誉需要维护的品牌。
products.description: Knockoff filters the trademark-squat pseudo-brands (the SZHLUXes and HORUSDYs) out of your search results, so what's left is brands with a reputation to lose.

products.name: Marked QL
products.tagline: Instant markdown previews in Finder
products.summaryZh: 在 Finder 中即时预览 Markdown
products.descriptionZh: Marked QL 在 macOS 快速查看中呈现精美的 Markdown 预览。由 Apex 提供数学公式、Mermaid 图表、语法高亮等支持。Mac App Store 售价 4.99 美元。
products.description: Marked QL renders beautiful Markdown previews in macOS Quick Look. Powered by Apex for math, Mermaid, syntax highlighting, and more. $4.99 on the Mac App Store.

products.name: Simba Voice Agents
products.tagline: Voice agents powered by Simba 3.2 the world's #1 voice model
products.summaryZh: 由Simba 3.2（全球排名第一的语音模型）驱动的语音代理
products.descriptionZh: Simba 语音代理：基于Simba 3.2（Artificial Analysis排名第一的模型）构建生产级语音代理。亚100毫秒延迟、原生流式处理、真实情感表现与SSML支持。最佳实时语音能力现已升级为完整代理平台，搭载于Speechify全新Speechify开发者平台。
products.description: Simba Voice Agents: build production voice agents on Simba 3.2, the #1 model on Artificial Analysis. Sub-100ms, streaming-native, real emotion and SSML. The best real-time voice, now a full agent platform, on Speechify's new Speechify Developer Platform.

products.name: UnitPay
products.tagline: Price, bill, and prove value for your AI product
products.summaryZh: 为你的AI产品定价、计费并证明其价值
products.descriptionZh: UnitPay是面向AI公司的变现操作系统。设计定价方案、运行基于使用量的计费、实时追踪推理成本与利润率，并向每位客户展示其实际获得的价值——全部集成于同一系统。专为AI原生产品构建：积分、混合定价、按Token计量、成本追踪。在年经常性收入达到50万美元前免费使用。
products.description: UnitPay is the monetization OS for AI companies. Design pricing, run usage-based billing, track inference costs and margins in real time, and show every customer the value they're actually getting — all in one system. Built ground-up for AI-native products: credits, hybrid pricing, per-token metering, cost tracking. Free until you hit $500K ARR.

products.name: Fudge MCP
products.tagline: Give your AI agents design taste from existing websites
products.summaryZh: 让你的AI代理从现有网站中获取设计品味
products.descriptionZh: Fudge：一款面向AI代理的设计参考引擎。与其让AI从头生成又一个“现代、高端”的界面，不如让它通过字体、颜色、组件、布局、页面类型和视觉相似性，搜索近万个真实网站。Fudge将可量化的设计证据与截图结合，通过MCP在本地运行，并通过Chrome扩展记住你保存的参考。给你的编码代理更好的品味，而非更多形容词。
products.description: Meet Fudge: a design reference engine for AI agents. Instead of asking AI to make another “modern, premium” interface from scratch, let it search nearly 10,000 real websites by fonts, colors, components, layouts, page types, and visual similarity. Fudge combines measured design evidence with screenshots, runs locally through MCP, and remembers references you save with its Chrome extension. Give your coding agent better taste and not more adjectives.

products.name: NoMac.app
products.tagline: The headless iOS app publishing pipeline for AI agents.
products.summaryZh: 面向AI代理的无头iOS应用发布流水线。
products.descriptionZh: 为AI代理构建的原生应用发布流水线：构建已签名的iOS版本以验证代码，几分钟内推送至TestFlight在iPhone上预览，并直接从代理提交至App Store。无需Mac，无需Xcode，全部通过NoMac CLI和MCP在您的Claude、Codex或Cursor代理中完成。
products.description: The native app publishing pipeline built for AI agents: build signed iOS releases to validate your code, push to TestFlight ot see preview on your iPhone in minutes, and submit to the App Store directly form your agent. No Mac, no Xcode, all from your Claude, Codex, or Cursor agent via NoMac CLI and MCP.

products.name: TailMux
products.tagline: Multiple Tailscale tailnets at once, no switching + no VM
products.summaryZh: 同时管理多个Tailscale网络，无需切换，无需虚拟机
products.descriptionZh: 官方 Tailscale 客户端一次只保持一个 tailnet 活跃。TailMux 可在 macOS 和 Linux 上同时访问工作与个人 tailnet，无需切换账户、运行多个系统守护进程或使用虚拟机。它按配置文件运行独立的嵌入式节点，并通过主机名进行路由，具备严格的无回退隔离机制。可跨 tailnet 同时使用 SSH、RDP/SMB、浏览器、curl、git 和 npm。
products.description: The official Tailscale client keeps one tailnet active at a time. TailMux makes work and personal tailnets reachable simultaneously on macOS and Linux, without switching accounts, running multiple system daemons, or using a VM. It runs an isolated embedded node per profile and routes by hostname, with strict no-fallback isolation. Use SSH, RDP/SMB, browsers, curl, git, and npm across tailnets at the same time.

products.name: Willow
products.tagline: Own your personal AI agent. Runs locally.
products.summaryZh: 拥有你的个人AI代理。本地运行。
products.descriptionZh: Willow 是一款本地优先的桌面AI代理，归你所有——而非你租用的又一款云端聊天工具。它运行在你的Mac上，驱动浏览器与桌面，完成多步骤任务，同时数据保留在设备端。终身使用299欧元，无需订阅。支持自带密钥/自带模型（或Ollama离线模式）。本地记忆+Markdown知识库。真正的电脑控制，而非仅提供建议。专为希望拥有专属代理的构建者打造。
products.description: Willow is a local-first desktop AI agent you own — not another cloud chat you rent. It runs on your Mac, drives browser + desktop, and finishes multi-step tasks while data stays on-device. €299 lifetime, no subscription. BYOK/BYOM (or Ollama offline). Local memory + Markdown vault. Real computer control, not just suggestions. Built for builders who want an agent that belongs to them.

products.name: Proxon
products.tagline: The management layer for your AI workforce
products.summaryZh: AI 工作团队的管理层
products.descriptionZh: AI正在渗透到每一家公司，但大多数领导者仍通过零散的工具、政策文档、发票和轶事来管理它。Proxon是您AI工作团队的记录系统：它连接团队已在使用的AI工具、代理和工作流程，然后展示谁在使用AI、成本是多少、涉及哪些数据、产生了什么成果，以及哪些环节缺乏所有权或治理。
products.description: AI is spreading across every company, but most leaders are still managing it through scattered tools, policy docs, invoices, and anecdotes. Proxon is the system of record for your AI workforce: it connects to the AI tools, agents, and workflows your teams already use, then shows who is using AI, what it costs, what data it touches, what outcomes it creates, and where ownership or governance is missing.

products.name: DueDocs
products.tagline: AI property contract review for Australian buyers and pros.
products.summaryZh: 面向澳大利亚购房者及专业人士的AI房产合同审查工具。
products.descriptionZh: DueDocs 是一款面向澳大利亚房产买家、投资者及产权转让师的AI合同审查工具。上传销售合同或卖方声明，即可在5分钟内查看关键风险、谈判要点，通过语音助手和AI聊天解答任何问题，并获取附带来源链接的社区洞察。专为看房买家及通过批量上传处理大量文件的团队设计。首份报告免费。查看示例：https://duedocs.com.au/sample。仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
products.description: DueDocs is AI‑powered contract review for Australian property buyers, investors, and conveyancers. Upload a Contract of Sale or vendor statement to see key risks, negotiation angles, Voice Agent and AI Chat to answer any question, and suburb insights with source‑linked findings in under 5 minutes. Built for buyers at open homes and teams handling volume via bulk upload. First report free. Check out our sample: https://duedocs.com.au/sample Informational only, not legal advice.

products.name: SandyWP
products.tagline: WordPress sandbox, instantly.
products.summaryZh: WordPress沙盒，即刻可用。
products.descriptionZh: 数秒内启动全新的WordPress沙盒环境。测试插件、主题和创意，无需担心影响真实站点。
products.description: Spin up a fresh WordPress sandbox in seconds. Test plugins, themes, and ideas without breaking real sites.

products.name: Coding harness for C/C++ developers
products.tagline: Debugs more than 40% of Multi SWE Bench C/C++ tasks
products.summaryZh: 修复了超过40%的Multi SWE Bench C/C++任务中的错误
products.descriptionZh: LLMs 能解决不到10%的真实C++任务。ByteAsk 是由100多名志愿者组成的社区项目，致力于改变这一现状。在你看到代码差异之前，ByteAsk 已与 sanitizers、调试器以及测试套件协同工作。内置支持 LLVM、GCC、gdb、Valgrind、CMake 等工具。已被 Anthropic、Google、Microsoft、Amazon 等公司的工程师使用。
products.description: LLMs solve <10% of real world C++ tasks. ByteAsk is a community effort of 100+ volunteers working to change this. ByteAsk works with the sanitizers, the debugger, and your test suite before you see a diff. Built-in support for LLVM, GCC, gdb, Valgrind, CMake, and more. Used by engineers across Anthropic, Google, Microsoft, Amazon and more.

products.name: AdTrigger.io
products.tagline: Ad automation triggered by weather, live sport & more coming
products.summaryZh: 由天气、实时体育赛事等触发的广告自动化即将推出
products.descriptionZh: AdTrigger 可在现实条件（如体育赛事直播和天气变化）触发时，暂停、启用或调整 Google Ads 广告系列的预算。规则每分钟可检查一次，支持 AND/OR 组合条件，每次操作均记录触发原因。AI 分析功能会读取你的账户并推荐规则——每个账户可免费运行一次。由独立创始人打造，专为需要监控事件敏感型支出的营销人员设计。所有注册用户均可获得 PH 专属福利：世界杯实时比赛数据访问权限。发送邮件至 bonus@adtrigger.io 领取。
products.description: AdTrigger pauses, enables, or adjusts budget on Google Ads campaigns when real-world conditions hit (live sports and weather). Rules check as often as every minute, compound with AND/OR, and every action is logged with its trigger reason. AI Analysis reads your account and recommends rules — one free run in every account. Built by a solo founder for marketers who babysit event-sensitive spend. All signups get PH bonus: World Cup live-match data access. Email bonus@adtrigger.io

products.name: Gitwork
products.tagline: Hire developers ranked by real GitHub output
products.summaryZh: 按实际GitHub产出排名雇佣开发者
products.descriptionZh: Gitwork 根据开发者在公开 GitHub 上的产出进行排名，并将每个个人资料转化为带评分的玩家卡片。可按角色浏览国家团队、用自然语言搜索、发布招聘需求，并向已认领个人资料并标记为可联系的开发者发送消息。
products.description: Gitwork ranks developers from public GitHub output and turns each profile into a scored player card. Browse country squads by role, search in plain English, post hiring requests, and message developers who have claimed their profile and marked themselves available.

products.name: Messello
products.tagline: One AI inbox for WhatsApp, Instagram, Telegram, and email
products.summaryZh: 一个AI收件箱，整合WhatsApp、Instagram、Telegram和邮件。
products.descriptionZh: Messello 是一款一体化客户沟通平台：通过统一收件箱整合 WhatsApp、Telegram、Instagram、网页聊天、电子邮件和短信，内置 AI 可根据您的帮助中心自动生成回复。所有渠道和 AI 功能均包含在内，每位客服人员固定费用 19 美元，提供 3 天免费试用。
products.description: Messello is an all-in-one customer communication platform: one shared inbox for WhatsApp, Telegram, Instagram, web chat, email & SMS — with built-in AI that drafts replies from your help center. Every channel and AI included, flat $19/agent. Free 3-day trial.
